reviews.reviewer: Lela Tredwell FROM THE WRITER OF BEST NEW PLAY AT BRIGHTON FRINGE 2019 AND WINNE
reviews.excerpt: FROM THE WRITER OF BEST NEW PLAY AT BRIGHTON FRINGE 2019 AND WINNER OF BRIGHTON FRINGE’S OUSTANDING SHOW AWARD 2021 From the writer of theatrical hit Clean, comes this excellent short play, exploring the price of isolation and the importance of human touch.
